subject: Snom, a small round larva-like creature with a pale translucent body, resting in a warm dappled forest setting
description: A small, round, pale creature resembling a larva or grub rests in the foreground of a warm, sunlit forest setting. The creature has a soft, rounded body with what appear to be small features on its face and tiny limb-like protrusions. Warm golden light filters through the trees behind it, casting dappled shadows and giving the scene a gentle, inviting quality despite the creature being a cold-type Pokémon. The background shows greenery and soft forest light.
background: warm sunlit forest with green foliage and dappled light
emotion: gentle, peaceful, soft and unassuming presence
